methods.description: Isolation and amplification of nifH and nirS genes from environmental cDNA using nested PCR and touchdown PCR techniques.

steps.description: The nifH gene from environmental cDNA was isolated using nested PCR with degenerate outer primers nifH4-nifH3 and inner primers nifH1-nifH2.
steps.searchable_summary: isolate nifH gene using nested PCR with specific primers

steps.description: Both rounds of PCR consisted of an initial denaturation step of 2 min at 94°C, cycling steps that included: a denaturation step of 30 s at 94°C, an annealing step of 30 s at 50°C, and an extension step of 1 min at 72°C. All reactions had a final extension step of 7 min at 72°C. First round reactions had 25 cycles and the second round reactions had 30 cycles.
steps.searchable_summary: perform nested PCR with specified thermal cycling conditions

steps.description: nirS was amplified using the primer pair nirS1F-nirS6R. After a 2 min initial denaturation step 94°C, a touchdown PCR was performed that consisted of a denaturation step of 30 s at 94°C, an annealing step of 30 s, and an extension step of 1 min at 72°C. During the first 11 cycles, the annealing temperature decreased 0.5°C every cycle starting at 56°C. For the last 25 cycles the annealing temperature was 54°C. A final extension step was performed for 7 min at 72°C.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify nirS gene using touchdown PCR with specified conditions

steps.description: After amplification, the PCR products were loaded onto a 1% agarose TAE gel. Bands of the correct size were purified using the QIAquick Gel Extraction.
steps.searchable_summary: purify PCR products using gel electrophoresis and extraction

methods.description: Analysis of C/N ratios and concentrations of total organic carbon (TOC) and total nitrogen (TN) in estuarine sediments to determine the source and impact of organic matter.

steps.description: The ratio of C/N can be a useful indicator of the source of organic matter preserved in sediments.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze C/N ratio to determine organic matter source

steps.description: Measurements of total organic carbon (TOC) and total nitrogen (TN) can also provide evidence for the long-term impacts of hypoxia.
steps.searchable_summary: measure TOC and TN to assess hypoxia impact

methods.description: Sub-sampling of sediment cores and extraction of DNA and RNA for further analysis.

steps.description: After the net N2 flux incubations were completed, the cores were sub-sampled using a 60 mL syringe.
The sub-cores were flash frozen in liquid N2 and sectioned into 1 cm segments from the sediment water interface to 6 cm in depth.
The frozen sediment cross-sections were cut up to yield 0.25 g and 0.5 g of wet sediment for DNA and RNA isolation.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare sediment for DNA and RNA isolation
